1: And he inclined unto me, and heard my cry.
2: And set my feet upon a rock, and and established my goings.
3: And shall trust in the LORD LORD .
4: And respecteth not the proud, nor such as turn aside to lies.
5: They are more than can be numbered.
6: Burnt offering and sin offering hast thou not required.
7: In the volume of the book it is it is written of me,
8: Yea, thy law is is within my heart.
9: Lo, I have not refrained my lips, O LORD LORD , thou knowest.
10: And thy truth from the great congregation.
11: Let thy lovingkindness and thy truth continually preserve me.
13: O LORD LORD , make haste to help me.
14: and put to shame that wish me evil.
15: That say unto me, Aha, aha.
16: Let such as love thy salvation say continually, the LORD LORD be magnified.
17: Thou art art my help and my deliverer; Make no tarrying, O my God.
